items.name_en: In Stock 22. Innovation never disappoints. By integrating power and elegant design aesthetics into the original beauty, the Chanel Gabrielle bag was born. It first appeared at the 2017 Spring/Summer Haute Couture show, and its silhouette has been everywhere at the recent fashion week. The delicate and soft body and the hard and structured bottom fully embody Mademoiselle Chanel's pursuit of freedom and comfort. Size 20cm

items.name_en: In stock 22k DUMA backpack, women's bag. Fall in love with this calfskin at first sight, this white is worry-free, it's easy to keep clean! The capacity is super impressive~ Pair this with a summer floral dress for an absolutely fairy-like look! It's also super fairy to wear in winter 🧚🏻‍♀️ The key point is: visually, the volume is only slightly larger than a chubby bag, but it's super cute and small on the body, yet the capacity is so impressive. Phone, card holder, water bottle, umbrella, and other small items can all be easily packed in. The front magnetic snap can hold a card holder and keys/lip balm, both fairy and practical! Dimensions: 18×18×12cm

items.name_en: In Stock 22K New Backpack 🖤 AS3662 Patent Leather. Happiness level maxed out 😍 This is a hot item 🔥 The degree of being loved is obvious to all! Waiting for it with bated breath~ Finally got it~ This is simply a blessing for large bag lovers. Patent leather has its own luster, not as delicate as sheepskin, but lighter than grained cowhide. Predicted it will be the bag everyone loves this year 👋 It's really , sweet and cool yet retro, this backpack is the center of attention, the patent leather wind of this year, no one can escape 🫶🫶 Simply too addictive! Really explosively good!! (size: 31.5*31*9cm)

items.name_en: In stock 22P Black Nylon MAX Bowling Bag 🎳
items.name_cn:
In stock 22P Black Nylon MAX Bowling Bag 🎳
A different kind of Chanel, expected to start a new fashion trend!
Previously, aside from the denim series which could be used simply and roughly, other Chanel bags basically required us to treat them gently~ This year's nylon series finally allows us to maintain Chanel's elegant and calm core while fulfilling the bag's mission as a storage item!
This is a big size version of a small lunch box, but the curvature of the bag is rounder, and it comes with a small card holder, so it can be considered a mother-daughter bag
Carried by hand or on the shoulder, it gives off a cool and chic vibe
The bigger, the more fashionable, truly a golden rule~
(Size: 25×46×28cm) 99150

items.name_en: In Stock 24A Double Pocket Messenger Bag
items.name_cn:
In Stock 24A Double Pocket Messenger Bag
Another messenger bag full of charm; you won't run out of bags this summer✨✨ The chain design is exquisite, featuring double-C clasps and two small pockets~ Made of oil-waxed lambskin, every detail reveals a perfect fusion of classic and modern. The vintage vibe is maxed out~ The distressed hardware is both beautiful and practical✌️🤩 It goes well with any outfit and is super durable! Predicted to be another bestseller🔥 Grab it now!!(24*15*6.5cm)99384

items.name_en: In Stock 24k Handle Box Bag
items.name_cn:
In Stock 24k Handle Box Bag
I call this diamond-handle long box the beauty ceiling of box bags! It fits a phone, has a built-in lipstick slot, and a small mirror. Made of fine lambskin with light gold hardware, fully leather-lined. It can fit an iPhone 13 Pro Max~ It's fine to put in your phone, compact powder, lipstick, car keys, perfume, tissues, and hand cream for daily outings.
size:16×10×8cm

items.name_en: In stock 24P Pearl Square Bag is something special, sisters. You might dodge autumn and winter, but you can't dodge spring and summer. This square bag is too beautiful. Who can refuse pearls? + Little Cute Square. Especially suitable for relatively slim girls, because it's not as thick as the square bag, it's thinner on the side. Whether you carry it or hold it, it's very small and exquisite but can still hold some things... Also, the sheepskin has been treated, so it's not as fragile as the sheepskin on the previous Golden Ball Square Bag. Everything is good except the price! I love it so much, sisters. Hope all sisters can buy the bags they like. Don't worry about what others think. 17cm 99334

items.name_en: In stock 25A Suede bag|
items.name_cn:
In stock 25A Suede bag|
New arrival of the 25A series, this suede and leather patch bag is a god-tier design! High-quality suede meets smooth calfskin, texture is maxed out. Quilted pattern + classic double C logo, low-key luxury!!️ Suede × glossy leather, the layering is amazing! Distressed gold chain is adjustable, shoulder/ crossbody/clutch in one bag! Fits phone + lipstick + compact, practical and structured! Versatile and suits everyone! size: 35*24*12cm

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: In stock 25C Hobo Bag - Denim Small
items.name_cn:
In stock 25C Hobo Bag - Denim Small
This bag is surprisingly light and beautiful in person. It has four slip pockets 👝, giving the whole bag a lot of energy. The chain is chunky, but the bag feels light on the shoulder. It's the kind of bag you can grab and go 😎. The body is made of lambskin, and the hardware is vintage, looking super textured!!! The capacity is huge; it can fit a large phone, sunglasses 🕶️, and more... It's not small at all. Highly recommended for daily use or taking photos 👍👍
Size: 22*31*15*cm
Model: AS5339
